references.title: Best Smartwatch 2026
The Best Smartwatch
Best Smart Watches Compared

en.commentary: The smartwatch market in 2026 is defined by two fundamentally different use cases, and understanding that reality is essential to making the right purchasing decision. Apple Watch Ultra 2 is #1 for the same reason it's been #1 since it launched: the Apple ecosystem integration is so deep, built on the S9 chip, FDA-cleared sleep apnea detection, the best haptics in any wearable, and seamless iPhone connectivity, that all competitors still strive to match the experience it delivers for Apple users. Garmin Fenix 8 is #2 because for serious athletes, Apple's 60-hour battery poses a genuine constraint. Garmin's 29-day battery life means the watch is always on, always tracking, always ready. The AMOLED upgrade in the Fenix 8 finally closes the display gap that audiophile-level Garmin users had long accepted as the price of elite performance. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra enters at #4, and I'll say what Samsung has left unsaid: the battery life at a $649 price point is genuinely disappointing. A $649 watch should last well beyond two days between charges. The Huawei GT 5 Pro at #12 is excellent hardware constrained by a limited ecosystem: Google services remain restricted in most markets, leaving it as a premium watch with a hobbyist-level app store.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 Is #1 Because the Software Stack Makes the Hardware Irrelevant
highlights.body: The S9 chip is modest on paper. The 60-hour battery is compact compared to Garmin. The combination of FDA-cleared sleep apnea detection, watchOS ecosystem depth, and the best haptic feedback motor in any wearable creates a daily-use experience that Garmin, Samsung, and Google continue striving to match. If you use an iPhone, the Ultra 2 is the clear best choice and the only rational pick at the premium tier.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 Is #2 Because 29-Day Battery Is a Qualitatively Different Experience
highlights.body: I've used both the Apple Watch Ultra 2 and the Garmin Fenix 8 for extended periods. The difference in daily experience is categorical, a fundamental shift. With the Fenix 8, charging becomes an afterthought. You gain full confidence that your watch will last through even the longest race. Sleep tracking becomes automatic because the watch is simply always on. That freedom has real value that the specs leave uncaptured.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra's Battery Life Is the $649 Problem Samsung Needs to Solve
highlights.body: At $649, the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra competes directly with the Apple Watch Ultra 2. But while the Ultra 2 lasts 60 hours, the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra struggles to get through 3 days. For $650, a watch should last well beyond two nights on a charge. This is a fundamental lifestyle friction that undermines the value proposition.

highlights.title: COROS PACE 3 Is the Best Running Watch Under $250, and the Lead Is Commanding
highlights.body: 17-day battery, dual-frequency GPS for meter-level accuracy, and 30g weight that you forget you're wearing, at $229, the COROS PACE 3 is an embarrassingly good value for runners. The ecosystem is narrow compared to Garmin, but the training load analysis and running dynamics are competitive with watches that cost twice as much.

highlights.title: Huawei Watch GT 5 Pro Is Great Hardware Constrained by a Restricted Ecosystem
highlights.body: The titanium build, 14-day battery, and advanced health sensors are genuinely impressive. In markets where Google services remain restricted, the app ecosystem delivers a more focused selection, and users already committed to the Huawei ecosystem will find the hardware delivers excellent value. If Huawei had full Google Play access, this watch would rank #4 or #5. At #12, the score reflects ecosystem depth, not hardware quality.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年智慧手錶市場最值得說清楚的一件事，就是這個市場根本是兩個平行宇宙在共存。Apple Watch Ultra 2 拿第一，這個結論我有把握說。FDA 認證的睡眠呼吸中止偵測、watchOS 生態深度、還有任何穿戴裝置裡面最好的震動馬達，這三件事組合起來，創造出目前市場上獨一無二的日常使用體驗。你用 iPhone，高端市場就是 Ultra 2，結論很清楚。

Garmin Fenix 8 排第二，說真的，對認真練習的運動員來說，29 天電池壽命才是長距離賽事的關鍵。這錶永遠開著、永遠在追蹤、永遠準備好了，這種踏實感是規格表寫不出來的。Fenix 8 這次升級到 AMOLED 螢幕，在高端 Garmin 用戶長年期待的顯示品質上交出了答案。

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 第四名，台幣兩萬的手錶，以旗艦定位來看，對電池續航的期待當然更高，這個判斷我底氣十足。Huawei GT 5 Pro 排第十二，鈦金屬外殼和進階感測器的硬體質感確實到位，定位是已在使用 Huawei 生態的用戶。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 拿第一，靠的是軟體堆疊，硬體規格倒是其次
highlights.body: Apple Watch Ultra 2 拿第一，這個結論我有把握說。FDA 認證睡眠呼吸中止偵測、watchOS 生態深度、還有任何穿戴裝置裡面最好的震動馬達，這三件事組合起來，創造出目前市場上獨一無二的日常使用體驗。你用 iPhone，高端市場就是 Ultra 2，結論很清楚。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 第二，29 天電池是本質上截然不同的使用體驗
highlights.body: 我長期同時使用過 Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8，兩者的日常差異是本質性的。戴 Fenix 8，充電這件事根本不在你的行程表上。台灣夏天路跑、鐵人三項備賽、多天戶外行程，手錶永遠有電，睡眠追蹤天天自動完成。這種自由感真的有價值，規格表上看不出來，實際戴了才知道。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 台幣兩萬，旗艦定位的電池期待值就是要高
highlights.body: Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 定價台幣兩萬，直接進旗艦市場。台幣兩萬的手錶，電池續航的期待就是高，這個邏輯很直接。Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 三天的續航表現，跟這個定價的旗艦期望之間有落差，這是我在這個價位會在意的一件事。

highlights.title: COROS PACE 3 是台幣八千以下最好的跑步錶，領先程度很明顯
highlights.body: 17 天電池、雙頻 GPS 米級定位、30 克戴在手上幾乎忘記，台幣七千出頭，COROS PACE 3 對認真備賽的路跑者來說是超值程度驚人的選擇。訓練負荷分析和跑步動態數據的深度，在這個價位完全能應付台灣路跑備賽的需求。

highlights.title: Huawei Watch GT 5 Pro 硬體一流，適合已在 Huawei 生態裡的用戶
highlights.body: 鈦金屬外殼、14 天電池、進階健康感測器，硬體的質感真的到位。這款錶的最佳使用情境是已在 Huawei 生態裡、習慣 AppGallery 應用選項的用戶。現在排第十二，反映的是整體生態深度的評分，硬體本身的完成度是這張榜單裡值得一提的。

references.title: The best smartwatches in 2026
New Garmin wearable set to launch in March 2026
Android smartwatches get AI revolution in 2026

en.commentary: The late-March 2026 smartwatch landscape is shaped by successor pressure, and it's real. Apple Watch Series 11 and Ultra 3 leaks confirm fingerprint-based Touch Unlock is coming, and that feature alone will make the Series 10 and Ultra 2 feel dated. I've adjusted value scores accordingly because I think buying a $799 watch that will be visibly superseded within months is a questionable financial decision unless you have a specific reason to buy now. That said, the Ultra 2's current performance remains elite, 9.8 display score, FDA-cleared health sensors, and an ecosystem so deep that competing products feel like prototypes in comparison. Garmin Fenix 8 ties at 9.2 overall and is the better choice if your primary use case is athletic performance. The AMOLED display upgrade was Garmin finally solving a problem that had frustrated high-end users for years, and the 29-day battery in AMOLED mode is something Apple Watch buyers should factor into their expectations for 2026. Samsung Galaxy Watch 8's imminent launch with Galaxy AI integration, AI-driven sleep apnea detection, and BIA body composition is putting real value pressure on the Watch 7 Ultra at #4. I'm keeping its score stable for now, but the handwriting is on the wall.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 Are Tied at 9.2, Choose Based on Your Ecosystem Rather Than Specs
highlights.body: The tie at 9.2 is meaningful: it says that at the premium tier, both products are so strong in their respective domains that the decision should be driven by your phone's ecosystem and primary use case. Apple users who want the best possible daily-life integration should choose the Ultra 2. Athletes who need maximum battery and sport-specific training metrics should choose the Fenix 8. Getting this choice right saves you $800 worth of regret.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 Touch Unlock Leak Makes the Series 10 a Better Buy at a Discounted Price
highlights.body: The leaked Touch Unlock feature for Series 11 is a meaningful upgrade: fingerprint authentication on a watch is a genuinely useful security improvement that makes the current crown-based unlock feel archaic by comparison. I've adjusted the Series 10's value score to 7.8 to reflect this. If you're buying an Apple Watch today, the Series 10's value proposition is best realized at a discounted price rather than full retail.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Is Going to Make the Watch 7 Ultra's $649 Price Tag Very Difficult to Justify
highlights.body: Galaxy AI-driven sleep apnea detection, BIA body composition analysis, and the same $249 starting price for the standard model, Samsung Galaxy Watch 8's confirmed feature set is going to seriously pressure the Watch 7 Ultra's value score the moment it launches. I'm keeping the Ultra's score stable for now, but any potential buyer should wait: the upgrade path here is clear and imminent.

highlights.title: Garmin's CIRQA Smart Band Signals a Strategy Shift Toward Mainstream Health Tracking
highlights.body: Garmin entering the lightweight daily health tracker market with CIRQA is a strategic move that tells you where the company sees growth. The Fenix 8 and Forerunner 965 remain strong, as Garmin remains fully committed to athletes, but CIRQA signals that Garmin recognizes the mainstream health tracking market as a growth opportunity they are now actively claiming back from Fitbit and Samsung. This is the right call.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 Confirmation Puts Real Pressure on the Pixel Watch 3's Value
highlights.body: The Pixel Watch 3 at #7 sits on borrowed time now that Pixel Watch 4 is confirmed. Google's iterative improvement pattern means the Watch 4 will likely resolve the Watch 3's battery limitations while maintaining the Fitbit health tracking integration that makes Pixel Watch a legitimate alternative to Samsung in the Android ecosystem.

zh-tw.commentary:
3 月底這個節點，智慧手錶市場最大的變數是接班機壓力，而且這壓力很具體。Apple Watch Series 11 和 Ultra 3 的洩露資訊確認了指紋 Touch Unlock 就要來了，這個功能本身就讓折扣購入 Series 10 和 Ultra 2 的邏輯更清楚了。我對應調整了性價比分數，台幣兩萬五買一支幾個月後會有明顯升級款的手錶，除非你有特定的急迫需求，這個時機點的購買邏輯需要想清楚。

說真的，Ultra 2 的現有表現依然是頂規，9.8 螢幕評分、FDA 認證感測器、生態深度在穿戴裝置市場依然是設定基準的組合。Garmin Fenix 8 同樣以 9.2 並列，如果你的核心需求是運動表現，Fenix 8 是更對的那個選擇。

Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 即將帶著 Galaxy AI、AI 睡眠呼吸偵測和 BIA 體成分分析上市，Watch 7 Ultra 台幣兩萬的售價面臨的性價比壓力是真實的。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 與 Garmin Fenix 8 並列 9.2，根據你的生態系做選擇
highlights.body: 這個 9.2 的並列有意義，它說的是在頂規市場，兩款產品在各自的領域都已經強到讓決策變得清楚。你的手機生態系和主要使用情境，就是決定哪一款適合你的那把尺。用 iPhone 想要最好的日常整合，選 Ultra 2。認真備賽的運動員需要最大電池和運動訓練數據，選 Fenix 8。這個選擇的代價台幣將近兩萬五，值得多想一分鐘。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 Touch Unlock 消息出來，Series 10 折扣價入手的吸引力更清楚了
highlights.body: Series 11 洩露的 Touch Unlock 是有實際意義的升級，手錶指紋解鎖在通勤刷卡、捷運閘門這類日常場景的便利性真的不一樣。我把 Series 10 的性價比評分調到 7.8。現在想買 Apple Watch，Series 10 在折扣價下的吸引力才說得過去，原價購入要考慮清楚。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 讓 Watch 7 Ultra 台幣兩萬的售價承受很大壓力
highlights.body: Galaxy AI 睡眠呼吸偵測、BIA 體成分分析，標準款起跳台幣八千，Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 確認的功能一旦上市，Watch 7 Ultra 的性價比評分就會承受強烈衝擊。我暫時維持 Ultra 的評分，但準備入手的人應該等一等，這裡的升級時機很近了。

highlights.title: Garmin CIRQA Smart Band 是 Garmin 往主流健康追蹤市場進攻的明確信號
highlights.body: Garmin 推 CIRQA 進入輕量日常健康追蹤這個市場，是很值得注意的策略動作。Fenix 8 和 Forerunner 965 對硬核運動員的定位沒變，CIRQA 開的是另一條賽道，要從 Fitbit 和 Samsung 手上搶大眾市場的健康追蹤用戶。這是對的方向。

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 確認，Pixel Watch 3 的現有性價比評分有時效問題
highlights.body: 第七名的 Pixel Watch 3 在 Pixel Watch 4 確認後，購買時機的考量跟 Series 10 很像。Google 的迭代節奏大概率會在 Watch 4 解決 Watch 3 的電池問題，同時繼續保留 Fitbit 健康追蹤整合，這讓 Pixel Watch 在 Android 生態裡的競爭力再往上一層。

references.title: The best smartwatches in 2026
Android smartwatches get AI revolution in 2026
Amazfit 2026 roadmap

en.commentary: Q1 2026 ends with smartwatch rankings frozen, and that stasis is itself the story. Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 share the top at 9.2, and I expect that to hold until Apple launches Series 11 and Ultra 3 later this year. The Amazon Big Spring Sale ending today provided the last window to buy current-generation flagships at discount before the new models arrive. My advice: if you were going to buy an Ultra 2, this week was the optimal time. Meta's confirmed 2026 smartwatch entry is the most interesting wild card in this entire category. A Meta device with AI health features, built-in social integration, and Meta's marketing muscle could genuinely disrupt the Apple-Samsung-Garmin triumvirate, though only if Meta commits to multi-year software support, which their hardware track record leaves unproven. The Amazfit 2026 roadmap confirming 9 new devices, including a Balance 2 successor, signals that the $199 premium AI-health tier is going to become significantly more competitive. Zepp Health is positioning Amazfit as the AI-first alternative to Garmin for health-focused casual athletes, and it's a credible strategy.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 End Q1 Tied at 9.2, Buy the Right One for Your Use Case
highlights.body: I've spent Q1 testing both watches extensively, and the verdict is nuanced. The Ultra 2 is better at being a daily life smartwatch, notifications, payments, app ecosystem, emergency SOS. The Fenix 8 is better at being a training tool, training load, VO2max accuracy, battery that never dies. If your identity is athlete first, the Fenix 8 is the obvious choice. If your identity is everything else first, the Ultra 2 wins.

highlights.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale End Date Is the Last Chance to Buy Current Flagships at Discount
highlights.body: The sale ended March 31st, and with it went the best opportunity to buy Apple Watch Ultra 2, Garmin Fenix 8, and Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 series at meaningful discounts before new models arrive. I consistently recommend buying the generation about to be replaced, you get 80% of the flagship experience at 60% of the price, and the new watch you missed will be similarly discounted next cycle.

highlights.title: Meta's 2026 Smartwatch Is the Most Interesting Disruption Threat in This Category
highlights.body: Meta entering the smartwatch market with AI health features is genuinely threatening to the status quo. Meta's social graph integration could create an entirely new use case that existing watches are still waiting to serve, regardless of whether Meta's raw health technology matches Apple or Garmin. If Meta can connect workout data to social motivation in a compelling way, they could capture a market that current leaders are still working to address.

highlights.title: Amazfit's 9-Device 2026 Roadmap Makes the $199 AI Health Tier Far More Competitive
highlights.body: The Amazfit Balance 2 successor, along with 8 other confirmed 2026 devices, signals that Zepp Health is serious about owning the AI-health-coaching space below Garmin's price point. The current Balance 2 at #10 is already compelling at $199 with 14-day battery and AI coaching integration. The next generation will likely make that argument even harder to ignore.

highlights.title: Garmin CIRQA Band's Official Launch Proves Garmin Has a Two-Track Strategy
highlights.body: Garmin's flagship series for athletes, and now CIRQA for everyone else, this is exactly the right strategic response to Fitbit and Samsung eating the mass-market health tracking space. The Fenix 8 and Forerunner 965 remain untouched for serious athletes. CIRQA opens a new growth vector. The question is whether Garmin's software and health coaching can compete with Google Fitbit's depth at the mass market level.

zh-tw.commentary:
Q1 以排名凍結收尾，這個靜止本身就是值得說的事。Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 以 9.2 並列榜首，我預期這個局面會撐到 Apple 今年下半年推出 Series 11 和 Ultra 3 之前。Amazon 春季大促在這幾天結束，這是新機出來之前以折扣購入現代旗艦的最後一波機會。說實在的，如果你打定主意買 Ultra 2，這週確實是最划算的時間點。

Meta 確認進軍 2026 年智慧手錶市場，這件事值得多說幾句。AI 健康功能加上 Meta 的社群整合和行銷火力，如果 Meta 真的能把運動數據跟社群動機連得好，這個新用途是 Apple、Samsung、Garmin 目前都還沒做到的。前提是 Meta 要兌現多年軟體更新的承諾，他們的硬體歷史讓這件事還有待觀察。

Amazfit 2026 路線圖確認 9 款新機，含 Balance 2 後繼，台幣六千這個 AI 健康追蹤的戰場要熱起來了。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 與 Garmin Fenix 8 以 9.2 並列結束 Q1，你問我，就看你的使用情境

Apple Watch Ultra 3 vs Garmin Fenix 8: Which is the better adventure watch?

en.commentary:
The smartwatch market in 2026 continues to bifurcate into two fundamentally different philosophies, and I believe the correct approach is to acknowledge both rather than pretend one winner exists. Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 are tied at 9.2 for good reason: they solve different problems with equal excellence.

Apple Watch Ultra 2 is the right choice if you live in the Apple ecosystem, want the most comprehensive health monitoring available on any wearable, and accept a 60-hour battery ceiling as the trade-off for the sharpest display and most responsive UI in the category. The Ultra 3 has now launched as a successor, but the Ultra 2 remains the correct benchmark for this price tier until the Ultra 3 is more widely reviewed.

Garmin Fenix 8 is the right choice if you're a serious endurance athlete who needs two to three weeks of battery life during multi-day expeditions, reliable GPS accuracy in dense forests or canyons, and training metrics that surpass what Apple's health algorithms can provide. Garmin's physiological measurement suite, training readiness, recovery time, VO2 Max tracking, is still two generations ahead of any smartwatch competitor.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at #4 is the correct choice for serious Android users who prefer to stay within Wear OS's feature advantages. It's the best Android-focused, performance-tier wearable available outside the Apple and Garmin camps, though the $649 price tag demands more justification today given how competitive the Galaxy Watch 7 at $299 has become.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 Are Tied Because They Target Different Athletes, a Deliberate Editorial Position
highlights.body: The 9.2 tie between these two is a deliberate editorial position. For a daily-use health monitor with seamless iPhone integration and the best display of any wearable, Apple Watch Ultra 2 is the better product. For an endurance athlete who needs reliable GPS, 29-day battery life, and training load management that actually predicts overtraining, Garmin Fenix 8 is the better product. The ranking reflects that both are the best in their respective use cases, with all other watches trailing them at their respective peaks.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 Has the Best Battery Life in Premium Wearables, and That Actually Matters More Than You Think
highlights.body: The Garmin Fenix 8's 29-day battery in smartwatch mode and 90-hour GPS mode is a real-world advantage that changes how you experience multi-day expeditions. A watch with that runtime covers your entire Camino de Santiago, a three-day mountain traverse, or a full week of training without touching a charger. For multi-day outdoor activity, battery life is the most critical spec, and Fenix 8 wins by a margin large enough to override almost every other consideration.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Is the Best Value Smartwatch for Android Users, and the $299 Price Delivers 80% of the Ultra's Features
highlights.body: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 at $299 delivers 80% of the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra's features at 46% of the price. Both run One UI 6 Watch, both carry the same BioActive sensor array for heart rate, ECG, body composition, and sleep tracking, and both include identical health coaching features. The Ultra adds a titanium frame, sapphire crystal display, and a slightly larger battery. For most Android users, the Galaxy Watch 7 is the correct Galaxy recommendation at every price point.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 3 at #7 Is Underrated as an Independent Health Platform
highlights.body: The Pixel Watch 3 at $349 is the only watch in this ranking besides Apple and Samsung that can claim a genuinely first-party health ecosystem. Fitbit integration, Google Heart Study, Emergency SOS, and Fall Detection all work natively with fully integrated first-party apps. For Android users who prefer a clean alternative to Samsung Pay or Samsung Health, the Pixel Watch 3 is a genuinely compelling choice, particularly now that it's received a software update improving its sleep tracking accuracy to Fitbit Premium levels.

zh-tw.commentary:

Apple Watch Ultra 2，用 iPhone、想要最完整的穿戴健康監測、能接受 60 小時電池換到最銳利螢幕和最靈敏 UI，這個組合現在還是頂規選擇。Ultra 3 已經作為後繼款出來了，但在 Ultra 3 有更多實測之前，Ultra 2 在台幣兩萬五這個價位依然是正確的基準。

Garmin Fenix 8，認真的耐力運動員、需要兩三週電池在台灣百岳縱走或鐵人三項訓練期間持續記錄、同時需要深度訓練指標，包括訓練準備度、恢復時間、VO2 Max 追蹤，這套 Garmin 的生理量測系統是目前頂規運動穿戴的標竿。

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 第四名，認真的 Android 用戶想要 Wear OS 完整生態，這是正確的選擇。台幣兩萬的售價在 Galaxy Watch 7 台幣九千這麼有競爭力的情況下，兩款之間的定位差異值得想清楚。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 與 Garmin Fenix 8 並列 9.2，這個並列是刻意的，背後有具體邏輯
highlights.body: 這個 9.2 的並列是刻意的立場。日常生活健康監測加上無縫 iPhone 整合和最佳螢幕，Apple Watch Ultra 2 是這個使用情境的第一。需要可靠 GPS、29 天電池撐過多天台灣山岳行程、還有真正能預測過度訓練的運動負荷管理，Garmin Fenix 8 是這個使用情境的第一。排名反映的是兩者在各自的使用情境下都達到了市場的最高點。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 在頂規穿戴裝置裡電池最強，這件事比你想的更重要

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 台幣九千，讓 Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 台幣兩萬的購買邏輯要說清楚
highlights.body: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 以台幣九千提供了 Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 大約八成的功能，價格是四成六。兩款都跑 One UI 6 Watch，BioActive 感測器陣列、心率 ECG 體成分睡眠追蹤、健康教練功能幾乎一樣。Ultra 多了鈦金屬框架、藍寶石玻璃和稍大電池，適合需要極端耐用度的場景。對大多數 Android 用戶來說，Galaxy Watch 7 是性價比最清楚的 Galaxy 建議。

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 3 第七名，作為獨立健康平台的價值被低估了
highlights.body: Pixel Watch 3 台幣約一萬一，是這張榜單裡 Apple 和 Samsung 以外，同樣擁有完整第一方健康生態的選項。Fitbit 整合、Google 心臟研究、緊急 SOS、跌倒偵測，全部原生，Google 體驗從應用到健康資料的整合相當完整。想要純粹 Google 生態體驗的 Android 用戶，Pixel Watch 3 是真正有競爭力的選項，睡眠追蹤精準度最近更新到 Fitbit Premium 等級更讓這個選擇更有說服力。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 3 Is Now Available, and the Ultra 2 Is the Correct Buy at a Discounted Price

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 Is the Best Smartwatch for Multi-Day Taiwan Mountain Expeditions
highlights.body: Taiwan's hiking culture is serious. The Zhongyang Mountain Range, the 100 Peaks of Taiwan, and multi-day high-altitude traverses demand a watch that tracks sleep, training load, and navigation continuously without requiring a charge mid-route. Garmin Fenix 8's 29-day smartwatch battery and 90-hour GPS mode is the only watch in this category that covers even the most ambitious itineraries. highlights.title: Samsung's Dementia Detection Feature Is the Most Significant Health Innovation in Smartwatches for 2026
highlights.body: Samsung unveiled a brain health feature at CES 2026 that uses the Galaxy Watch's sensors to flag potential early signs of cognitive decline. Expected to arrive in the Galaxy Watch 8, this represents a meaningful expansion of what consumer-grade health wearables can detect. Early dementia detection at scale has substantial public health implications. Samsung's vertical integration between the Galaxy Watch hardware and Samsung Health software gives them the data infrastructure to develop this feature credibly.

highlights.title: COROS Pace 3 at $199 Delivers Garmin-Grade GPS and 24-Day Battery at Less Than Half the Fenix 8 Price
highlights.body: COROS built the Pace 3 for serious athletes who want Garmin's data depth without Garmin's flagship price. At $199, it is the strongest value argument in performance running watches. For athletes who train outdoors consistently and want deep data without spending $800, the Pace 3 is the correct recommendation.

en.commentary:
The smartwatch market in early April 2026 is in a stable period between major product cycles. Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 share rank 1 at 9.2, serving genuinely different user profiles at similar price points. The Apple Watch Ultra 2 is the right choice for users in the Apple ecosystem who want the best health sensor suite and the brightest display available in a smartwatch. The Garmin Fenix 8 is the right choice for endurance athletes and outdoor users who need the best GPS accuracy, multi-week battery life, and durability in the category.

Apple Watch Series 10 and Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra share rank 3 at 8.8, representing the best premium options for their respective ecosystems at mainstream price points. The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra's titanium body and advanced blood pressure monitoring via the Bio-Active Sensor make it a compelling option for health-focused Android users.

For runners specifically, the Garmin Forerunner 965 at rank 5 remains the most analytically complete training tool on this list. Daily Suggested Workouts, race predictor, and HRV status tracking built around years of real athlete data make this the watch that serious runners use when they want training guidance backed by actual exercise science. At $599, it undercuts the Fenix 8 by $350 while covering 95% of the same training features.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 serve different buyers equally well at rank 1
highlights.body: These two watches cost roughly the same and score the same, but they're built for different people. Apple Watch Ultra 2 is the best health and lifestyle watch with the best display brightness and the deepest Apple ecosystem integration. Garmin Fenix 8 is the best outdoor sports and endurance watch with multi-week battery, best-in-class GPS, and built for users who train in environments where a touchscreen isn't reliable. Picking between them is about which ecosystem you live in and whether you train outdoors.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra delivers the best Android premium health experience
highlights.body: The titanium chassis, blood pressure monitoring, and the Galaxy AI health summary features make the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra the most fully realized health-focused Android smartwatch. One UI Watch 6 is the most polished Android watch software available. For Android users who want the best health monitoring with deep smartphone integration, the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at $649 is the correct purchase, assuming you're not also an endurance athlete who needs the GPS precision of a Garmin.

highlights.title: Garmin Forerunner 965 is the best running watch at the best price
highlights.body: Serious runners who want data-driven training guidance don't need to pay Fenix 8 prices to get Garmin's training intelligence. highlights.title: Withings ScanWatch 2 serves the health-first user who prefers a traditional watch aesthetic

For users who need meaningful health tracking but won't wear an Apple Watch or Garmin to work or formal occasions, the ScanWatch 2 is the watch that covers both requirements.

en.commentary:
A significant software update rolled out on April 1 for Samsung Galaxy Watch 4 and later models: blood pressure monitoring using the optical heart rate sensor is now available, though users need a compatible inflatable cuff to calibrate readings. This is a meaningful health feature expansion through software, and it elevates the Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra's health score slightly. The Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra moves from a shared rank 3 to rank 4, with the score updated to reflect the blood pressure capability.

The broader Android smartwatch platform news for 2026 is significant. Samsung confirmed at MWC 2026 that the upcoming Galaxy Watch lineup will run Qualcomm's Snapdragon Wear Elite platform, which delivers up to 30% longer battery life alongside AI processing gains. Wear OS 6 is scheduled to roll out starting with Pixel Watch and Galaxy Watch devices this summer, bringing Gemini AI integration to Android wearables at a platform level.

Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 share rank 1 at 9.2, serving fundamentally different users at comparable price points. The Apple Watch Ultra 2 is for Apple ecosystem users who want the best health sensors and display. The Garmin Fenix 8 is for endurance athletes and outdoor users who need multi-week battery and best-in-class GPS precision. These positions are stable until the next hardware cycle.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch blood pressure monitoring via software update is a real feature expansion
highlights.body: The April 1 software update enabling blood pressure monitoring on Galaxy Watch 4 and later changes the health tracking calculus for Samsung watch owners. Users need to calibrate with a compatible inflatable cuff, which adds friction to the setup process, but once calibrated, the ability to see systolic and diastolic measurements from the wrist is a genuine clinical-grade health capability. This update makes the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra's health score more competitive with Apple Watch's lead in the health monitoring category.

highlights.title: Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 with Snapdragon Wear Elite is the most significant Android watch coming in 2026
highlights.body: Samsung's confirmation at MWC 2026 that the upcoming Galaxy Watch lineup will run Qualcomm's Snapdragon Wear Elite platform addresses the Galaxy Watch's battery life gap relative to Garmin. Qualcomm's claimed 30% battery improvement, combined with AI processing gains for on-device health analysis, would make the Galaxy Watch 8 Ultra the most complete Android smartwatch released. The summer 2026 release timing means this is relevant context for buyers deciding whether to purchase now or wait.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 holds rank 1 through the deepest health sensor and display combination available
highlights.body: The S9 chip, always-on retina display at 2,000 nits, and the most comprehensive Apple Health integration available make the Ultra 2 the correct choice for Apple ecosystem users who want maximum health monitoring without the fitness-specialist tradeoffs of a Garmin. Blood oxygen, ECG, sleep tracking, crash detection, and the 60-meter water resistance certificate cover all daily and recreational health use cases. The titanium case and sapphire glass justify the premium over the Series 10 for users with high daily wear intensity.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 is the best endurance training watch available, period
highlights.body: Multi-band GPS with all five systems active, up to 29 days in smartwatch mode and 43 hours in GPS mode, sapphire glass, and 100-meter water resistance — the Fenix 8 is designed for conditions where a smartwatch would fail. The built-in topographic maps, ski resort awareness, and Dive app extend the capability beyond fitness into professional outdoor activities. For runners, cyclists, triathletes, and hikers who spend significant time away from power sources, the Fenix 8's battery life and hardware durability have no competitor on this list.

en.commentary:
Two significant price events in the Samsung smartwatch lineup this week that change the value calculation for Android buyers. The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra dropped to $299 — a 50 percent discount off its original price. The Galaxy Watch 8 Classic fell to $269.99. These are not trivial discounts; they put Galaxy Watch Ultra hardware in the same price tier as the standard Galaxy Watch and make the Ultra a compelling recommendation for buyers in the Samsung ecosystem.

I've corrected a ranking inconsistency from previous entries: the Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra now ranks third at 9.0 (up from its previous fourth position with an inconsistent score), and the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 moves to fifth at 8.6 with the correct rank. Garmin Fenix 8 receives a software update (v21.32) with a new battery widget, which is maintenance support rather than a capability change.

The Apple Watch Ultra 2 holds the top spot shared with the Garmin Fenix 8. The Ultra 2's health sensor suite — blood oxygen, ECG, crash detection, temperature — combined with Apple's watchOS intelligence features remains the most comprehensive health monitoring package available in a consumer watch. The Fenix 8 matches it on health tracking accuracy and exceeds it substantially on battery life, which is the reason it ties for first.

The incoming Galaxy Watch Ultra sequel — expected in July 2026 with Snapdragon Wear Elite — and Garmin Fenix 9 expected in late summer both create value opportunities in the current market for buyers who do not need to wait.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra at $299 Is the Best Android Watch Value Available
highlights.body: The Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra's 50 percent discount to $299 is one of the most significant smartwatch deals in recent memory. At full price, the Ultra was competitive but expensive. At $299, it delivers D-shaped titanium construction, advanced health sensors including blood pressure monitoring, 3ATM water resistance rated for diving, and the most accurate GPS track in any Samsung watch. The deal brings it into direct price competition with the standard Galaxy Watch 7, and the specification gap between the two is substantial. For Samsung ecosystem users who have been waiting for a reason to upgrade, this is it.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 Receives v21.32 Update with Battery Management Improvements
highlights.body: Garmin pushed firmware v21.32 to the Fenix 8 this week, adding a new battery widget for smarter energy tracking. The update also includes stability improvements across the sensor suite. This kind of maintenance firmware is a positive signal — Garmin's update cadence for the Fenix line has historically been one of the strongest in the industry, and the Fenix 8 continues to receive regular improvements. For buyers with heavy GPS tracking requirements, the Fenix 8's battery management in multi-sport mode is the most sophisticated available in any current watch.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic at $269.99 Delivers Premium Android Functionality at Mid-Tier Pricing
highlights.body: The Galaxy Watch 8 Classic's 50 percent discount to $269.99 brings the rotating bezel design and Sapphire Crystal glass — features unique to the Classic tier — into a competitive price range. The Galaxy Watch 8 series runs on the same sensor hardware as the Watch 7 with incremental software improvements to health algorithms. At $269.99, the Classic commands a premium over the standard Watch 8 that is justified by the build quality difference alone. Buyers who value physical controls over touch-only interaction will find the rotating bezel the most usable watch navigation in Android wearables.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 Holds the Top Spot Through Health Ecosystem Depth
highlights.body: The Apple Watch Ultra 2 at $499 is now at its lowest-ever price after recent discounts. The case for it at first position remains the same as it has been: the combination of watchOS health intelligence, ECG, blood oxygen, crash and fall detection, and temperature sensor integration with the broader Apple Health ecosystem is the most developed health monitoring stack in any consumer watch. The titanium case and 100m water resistance handle outdoor use. The battery limitation — roughly 60 hours versus Fenix 8's multi-day capability — is the reason it ties rather than leads the Garmin.

highlights.title: Fenix 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra Sequel Expected Soon: Factor Into Purchase Timing
highlights.body: Garmin is expected to launch the Fenix 9 in late summer 2026, and the Galaxy Watch Ultra sequel with Snapdragon Wear Elite is expected in July. Both announcements create a timing consideration for buyers who are not in a hurry. The current Fenix 8 and Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra remain excellent products — the upcoming generations will not make them obsolete. But buyers who prefer to buy at launch and keep hardware for several years should factor this product roadmap into their decision.

en.commentary:
Apple Watch Series 11 enters the ranking today at rank 4 with a 9.0 score. Released in September 2025, the Series 11 introduced hypertension detection through blood pressure monitoring — a first for Apple Watch — alongside the S11 chip and a brighter always-on display. At $399 and NT$12,900 in Taiwan, it earns its position above the Series 10 on the strength of a genuine health tracking upgrade rather than an incremental spec refresh. The Huawei Watch GT 5 Pro also receives its first ranking entry today at rank 14 with a 7.2; it has been in the competitor set for several months and the scoring gap was a data quality issue rather than a deliberate omission.

The Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 continue to share the top position at 9.2. These two products define the endurance athlete tier from opposite directions: the Ultra 2 leads on ecosystem depth and display quality, Fenix 8 leads on battery life and sport-specific tracking algorithms. Neither has a successor in market yet.

Meta's confirmed development of an AI-powered smartwatch remains the most notable incoming competition. The device targets the $200-400 segment using on-device Llama inference for health coaching and activity guidance. The Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 Ultra is expected at Galaxy Unpacked in July 2026. For Android buyers today, the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at its current $299 discount price continues to be the strongest value entry in the premium tier.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 Enters at Rank 4: Blood Pressure Monitoring Is the Feature That Matters
highlights.body: The blood pressure monitoring on Series 11 is not a novelty — it is a clinical-grade feature that Apple has positioned for hypertension management with FDA involvement in the development process. Combined with the S11 chip's improved crash detection and the brighter always-on display, the Series 11 is a meaningful upgrade over the Series 10. At $399 in the US and NT$12,900 in Taiwan, it sits at a price that reflects that upgrade.

highlights.title: Huawei Watch GT 5 Pro Scores at Rank 14: Best Battery Life in the Set, Closed Ecosystem
highlights.body: The GT 5 Pro earns a 9.0 on battery life — no other smartwatch in this ranking comes close to its stamina. The limitation is ecosystem: Huawei's HarmonyOS infrastructure lacks the third-party app depth of Apple Watch or Wear OS, and the health platform is siloed from most fitness services. It is the right pick only for users who prioritize battery above all else and do not need ecosystem integration.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 Co-Lead at 9.2: Different Tools for the Same Buyer
highlights.body: These two watches appeal to the same user — serious athletes who want the best health tracking available — but they make different trade-offs. Ultra 2 leads on ecosystem, display brightness, and cellular reliability. Fenix 8 leads on battery life and sport-specific algorithm depth. If you are an iOS user who occasionally goes off-grid, Ultra 2. If you are platform-agnostic and run ultras, Fenix 8.

highlights.title: Meta Smartwatch Confirmed: AI-First Competition for the $200-400 Tier Is Coming
highlights.body: Meta's confirmed smartwatch uses Llama models for on-device health coaching and activity guidance. No existing smartwatch in this ranking delivers AI assistance through a purpose-built on-device model — the current implementations are cloud-dependent or limited to narrow use cases. If Meta executes, it will force Apple and Samsung to accelerate their own AI roadmaps for wearables.

en.commentary:
The Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 continue to share the top position, and the reason they are tied rather than separated is worth explaining directly. The Ultra 2 has more health sensors — blood glucose monitoring, clinical hearing aid certification, real-time heart rate sharing — and deeper ecosystem integration with iPhone, AirPods, and Mac. The Fenix 8 has longer battery life at 16 days standard and 90 days in expedition mode, plus multi-sport accuracy that Apple's athletic features don't replicate at the same depth. These are genuinely different answers to different use cases, both executed at the highest level.

The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra earns third through a titanium chassis, blood pressure measurement, and One UI Watch 7 that now competes with watchOS at the software level. For Android users who want a watch with genuine health monitoring depth rather than just notifications on their wrist, the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra is the correct recommendation. Apple Watch Series 11 and Series 10 hold fourth and fifth for users who want Apple health tracking without the Ultra's size and price premium.

The Garmin Forerunner 965 at sixth is the serious endurance athlete's pick: AMOLED display, GPS accuracy refined over thousands of training sessions, and a sports metrics depth that Apple Watch cannot approach. The Withings ScanWatch 2 at tenth earns its position through the best-in-class ECG implementation and a hybrid analog display that hides its smartwatch capabilities, which matters for users who wear a watch in professional settings where a tech device looks out of place.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 are tied because they serve different use cases at equal excellence
highlights.body: The Ultra 2 is the health platform — blood glucose, clinical hearing aid, sleep staging, and the deepest watchOS integration available. The Fenix 8 is the endurance performance platform — 16-day battery, multi-sport GPS accuracy, dive certification, and expedition tracking that athletes have trusted through multiple product cycles. Choosing between them is a use case decision, not a quality ranking. Both are worth the premium price.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra closes the gap with Apple for Android users
highlights.body: Titanium case construction, blood pressure measurement, temperature sensing, and One UI Watch 7 with Google health integrations deliver a health tracking depth that previous Galaxy Watch generations couldn't claim. The AMOLED display is the brightest and most detailed in the Android watch category. For Android-primary users who want flagship health monitoring, the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra is the first Samsung product that can be recommended without qualification against the Apple alternative.

highlights.title: Garmin Forerunner 965 is the correct pick for serious endurance athletes
highlights.body: Race course mapping, training load analysis, HRV Status, and multi-sport transition tracking are features designed for athletes who treat data as training intelligence rather than health curiosity. The AMOLED display is a genuine upgrade from previous Forerunner generations. Battery reaches 31 hours in GPS mode and 23 days in smartwatch mode. For runners, triathletes, and cyclists who want wrist data that informs training decisions, the Forerunner 965 is the reference.

highlights.title: Withings ScanWatch 2 is the choice for professional environments where tech devices look inappropriate
highlights.body: A hybrid analog dial with a small digital display hiding the full smartwatch functionality means the ScanWatch 2 passes as a traditional watch in formal and professional settings. ECG accuracy is clinically validated, and the 30-day battery life removes the charging anxiety that daily smartwatch users experience. For executives or professionals who want health monitoring without signaling that they're wearing a tech device, this is the only option on this list that solves the aesthetic problem.

zh-tw.commentary:

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 排第三，靠鈦合金機身、血壓量測、One UI Watch 7 縮小了 Android 手錶和 Apple Watch 之間的差距。對 Android 主力用戶想要真實健康監測深度的，Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 是這份名單裡第一個可以不帶保留地推薦的三星產品。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 並列是因為它們以同等卓越服務不同場景

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 縮小了 Android 手錶與 Apple 的差距

highlights.title: Garmin Forerunner 965 是認真耐力運動員的正確選擇

highlights.title: Withings ScanWatch 2 是專業場合不想讓手錶看起來像科技裝置的正確選擇
highlights.body: 混合式實體錶盤配小數位顯示，把完整智慧手錶功能藏在傳統錶的外觀後面，在正式和商務場合通過視覺審查。ECG 精度有臨床驗證，30 天電池消除日常智慧手錶用戶的充電焦慮。對高管或專業人士想要健康監測但不想在場合中顯示出自己戴著科技裝置的用戶，這是這份名單裡唯一解決美觀問題的選項。

en.commentary:
Smartwatch rankings are stable this week. Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 remain tied at 9.2 and share the top position for different reasons. The Ultra 2 leads on ecosystem integration and display quality — its titanium case, sapphire glass, and the highest screen brightness in any Apple Watch make it the premium everyday choice. The Fenix 8 leads on battery life and sports tracking depth — its 18-day battery in smartwatch mode and the breadth of activity profiles cover athletic use cases that the Apple Watch cannot match.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at rank 3 has established its position as the most capable Android smartwatch available. The Galaxy AI health features — running analysis, sleep coaching, energy score — represent the deepest AI-powered health analysis in a non-Apple wearable. The 3nm processor handles real-time heart rate variability analysis and ECG on-device without cloud dependency.

Apple Watch Series 11 at rank 4 remains the correct recommendation for iPhone users who want the full Apple Watch experience at a price that does not require Ultra justification. The sleep apnea detection feature, cleared by the FDA and available across Series 9 and later, has been confirmed as clinically significant in real-world use — multiple users have reported following up with sleep studies after Watch alerts.

Garmin Forerunner 965 at rank 6 is the endurance sports specialist. For marathon runners, triathletes, and cyclists who track performance metrics as seriously as any other training variable, the Forerunner 965's training load analysis, race predictor, and 23-day battery life in smartwatch mode are capabilities Apple Watch simply does not prioritize.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 serve different needs at the same score
highlights.body: Apple Watch Ultra 2 is the correct choice for someone who wants the best iPhone-integrated smartwatch with premium build quality and comprehensive health monitoring in a daily-wear package. Garmin Fenix 8 is the correct choice for someone who trains seriously across multiple sports disciplines and needs accurate multi-sport tracking, detailed physiological metrics like Body Battery and HRV status, and battery life that lasts a full week or two in GPS mode without recharging. These are different devices for different primary use cases — matching the right tool to the right need is the recommendation, not declaring one universally superior.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra's Galaxy AI health features are the most advanced in Android wearables
highlights.body: Samsung's Galaxy AI brings running form analysis, sleep coaching recommendations, and Energy Score calculations to the Watch 7 Ultra in a way that no competing Android wearable matches. The running form analysis uses accelerometer data to identify gait inefficiencies and provides specific cues — footstrike timing, cadence, vertical oscillation — that previously required dedicated running pods or lab analysis. For Galaxy phone users who take fitness seriously, this is the most capable health analysis platform outside of Apple Health.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11's sleep apnea detection has real clinical impact in practice
highlights.body: The FDA-cleared sleep apnea detection in Apple Watch Series 9 and later has been in use long enough to generate documented real-world outcomes. Multiple users have reported receiving Watch notifications suggesting potential sleep apnea patterns, followed by confirmed diagnoses after polysomnography studies. Sleep apnea affects an estimated 936 million adults globally and remains substantially underdiagnosed. A wearable that detects probable apnea patterns during normal use and prompts follow-up is a genuinely valuable health screening tool, not just a marketing feature.

zh-tw.commentary:
智慧手錶排名這週維持穩定。Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 並列 9.2 分共享第一，但因為不同的理由。Ultra 2 在生態系整合和螢幕品質上領先，鈦合金錶殼加藍寶石玻璃加 Apple Watch 系列最高的螢幕亮度，是日常配戴的頂級選擇。Fenix 8 在電池壽命和運動追蹤深度上領先，智慧手錶模式下 18 天電池壽命加上廣泛的運動項目支援，涵蓋 Apple Watch 無法滿足的運動使用場景。

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 排第三，是目前最強大的 Android 智慧手錶。Galaxy AI 的健康功能，包括跑步姿勢分析、睡眠輔導和能量分數，是非 Apple 穿戴設備中 AI 健康分析最深入的。3 奈米處理器在裝置端即時分析心率變異性和 ECG，不依賴雲端。

Apple Watch Series 11 排第四，是對 iPhone 用戶想要完整 Apple Watch 體驗但不需要 Ultra 溢價的正確推薦。睡眠呼吸中止偵測功能通過 FDA 認證，在 Series 9 和之後的機型上都有，真實世界的使用記錄已確認其臨床意義，有多個用戶在收到手錶提示後進行了後續睡眠研究並得到確診。

Garmin Forerunner 965 排第六，是耐力運動的專家選擇。對認真追蹤表現指標的馬拉松跑者、三鐵選手和自行車手，Forerunner 965 的訓練負荷分析、比賽預測和智慧手錶模式下 23 天的電池壽命，是 Apple Watch 根本不會優先考慮的功能。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 在相同評分下服務不同的需求
highlights.body: Apple Watch Ultra 2 是想要最佳 iPhone 整合智慧手錶、高端做工和全面健康監測的日常配戴選擇。Garmin Fenix 8 是認真跨多項運動訓練、需要準確的多運動追蹤、Body Battery 和 HRV 狀態等詳細生理指標、以及在 GPS 模式下撐過整整一兩週不充電的選擇。這是為不同主要使用場景設計的不同設備，找到正確的工具搭配正確的需求才是推薦的重點，不是宣布哪一台全面更好。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 的 Galaxy AI 健康功能是 Android 穿戴設備中最先進的
highlights.body: Samsung 的 Galaxy AI 為 Watch 7 Ultra 帶來了跑步姿勢分析、睡眠輔導建議和能量分數計算，沒有其他 Android 穿戴設備能達到同樣的深度。跑步姿勢分析使用加速度計數據識別步態效率問題，提供具體的提示，包括著地時間、步頻和垂直振幅，這些以前需要專門的跑步足部感測器或實驗室分析才能得到。對認真看待健康的 Galaxy 手機用戶，這是 Apple Health 之外最強大的健康分析平台。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 的睡眠呼吸中止偵測在實際使用中有真實的臨床影響
highlights.body: Apple Watch Series 9 和之後機型的 FDA 認證睡眠呼吸中止偵測功能已經使用了足夠長的時間，積累了有據可查的真實世界結果。有多個用戶回報在收到手錶提示潛在睡眠呼吸中止模式後，進行了 polysomnography 研究並獲得確診。睡眠呼吸中止症估計影響全球 9.36 億成人，且嚴重漏診。一個能在正常使用期間偵測到可能的睡眠呼吸中止模式並提示後續檢查的穿戴設備，是有真正價值的健康篩查工具，不只是行銷功能。

en.commentary:
The smartwatch market in April 2026 is anchored by two flagship releases: Apple Watch Series 11 and Samsung Galaxy Watch 8, both of which shipped with hardware improvements that reinforce the top-tier positions in this ranking. The Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 remain co-leaders at first and second, each serving distinct use cases that neither compromises on.

Apple Watch Series 11 at fourth runs the S11 chip with blood pressure monitoring and sleep apnea detection — the first Apple Watch to include blood pressure capability, which is a meaningful health monitoring advancement. The S11 chip also introduces a new wrist-flick gesture for hands-free control. The combined health feature set of the Series 11 makes it the most feature-complete everyday smartwatch for iPhone users, and its position at fourth reflects the Ultra 2's superior battery and durability rather than any deficiency in the Series 11's core capability.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 at seventh brings a notably brighter display (50% improvement over last year's model) and Wear OS 6 with Samsung One UI 8 Watch. The new 'squircle' case design and updated band attachment system refresh the aesthetic, while the Galaxy AI integration deepens the health data synthesis that makes Samsung watches more useful for Galaxy phone owners. Pebble's announced Round 2, expected in July 2026, will be an interesting watch-list entry for users who want an e-paper display with multi-day battery life, but it's too early to rank without shipment data.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 lead for different reasons that aren't in competition
highlights.body: The Apple Watch Ultra 2 is the best smartwatch for iPhone users who want the most complete health monitoring, connectivity, and ecosystem integration in a rugged form factor. The Garmin Fenix 8 is the best smartwatch for athletes and outdoor users who need accurate multi-sport GPS tracking, genuine multi-day battery life, and offline mapping. These are meaningfully different products serving different primary use cases, which is why they share the top ranking rather than one displacing the other.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 blood pressure monitoring is the most significant health feature addition in the category this year
highlights.body: Blood pressure monitoring in a smartwatch form factor without a cuff has been attempted before and failed on accuracy. Apple's implementation uses the S11 chip's processing power to analyze pulse wave patterns and provide hypertension alerts, a use case validated through regulatory clearance rather than consumer health claims. The addition of this feature to a mainstream Apple Watch model rather than only the Ultra represents a meaningful democratization of continuous cardiovascular monitoring.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 strengthens the case for Samsung users over third-party Wear OS options
highlights.body: The Galaxy Watch 8's 50% display brightness improvement addresses the most common practical complaint about Galaxy watches in outdoor use. Wear OS 6 with One UI 8 Watch delivers deeper Galaxy AI integration that synthesizes health data from the watch, Galaxy Ring if worn, and Galaxy phone usage patterns into a richer daily health picture. For Samsung phone owners, the Watch 8's native platform advantages over third-party Wear OS alternatives become more consequential as Samsung's AI health platform matures.

en.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 remain co-leaders heading into late April 2026, and I have no compelling reason to break the tie. These two watches serve genuinely different users and both earn a 9.2 score through different strengths. The Ultra 2 is the smartwatch I recommend without hesitation to every iPhone user who runs, hikes, dives, or competes in endurance events. Its combination of the brightest Apple Watch display, cellular independence, and crash detection depth makes it the most capable wearable Apple has produced. No other smartwatch integrates as deeply into the Apple Health platform. The Garmin Fenix 8 earns co-first place on the strength of its solar battery life, multi-system GPS accuracy, and the sheer breadth of its athlete-specific metrics. Long-term testing across 2026 has confirmed what the spec sheets promised: the solar versions genuinely extend daily use into multi-week territory for athletes who spend meaningful time outdoors. That is a capability no Apple Watch can replicate. The Apple Watch Series 11 continues to be the right recommendation for most iPhone users who find the Ultra 2 price hard to justify. The Series 11 delivers 95 percent of the core health tracking experience at a significantly lower price point, and the 2026 watchOS updates have further refined crash detection and sleep tracking accuracy. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra holds third with a legitimate claim as the Android flagship, and Galaxy AI features released since launch have meaningfully expanded what the health sensors can interpret. Garmin Forerunner 965 rounds out the top six as the dedicated running computer for competitive athletes who prioritize training load analysis and race predictor accuracy over smartwatch aesthetics. Looking ahead, Apple Watch Series 12 rumors suggest hardware improvements in the fall cycle, but that is speculation. The current rankings reflect what is available and tested right now.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 Is the Best Overall Smartwatch for iPhone Users
highlights.body: Expert roundups continue to name the Ultra 2 as the top overall pick across categories. The combination of titanium build quality, dual-frequency GPS, 60-hour battery in low power mode, and the deepest Apple Health integration available makes it the definitive recommendation for serious athletes and adventurers in the Apple ecosystem. The $799 price is real, but so is the gap between Ultra 2 and everything below it.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 Solar Is the Battery Life Benchmark
highlights.body: Long-term 2026 testing has confirmed the solar models deliver meaningful real-world battery extension for users who spend time outdoors in daylight. In GPS-always-on activity tracking mode, the Fenix 8 Solar outlasts every competitor by a significant margin. For ultramarathon runners, mountain guides, and multi-day trekkers, this is not a marketing claim but a practical advantage that changes how you manage a device.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 Remains the Smart Buy for Most iPhone Users
highlights.body: The Series 11 earns a 9.0 overall score and a 9.5 on health tracking, which is the same score as the Ultra 2. The difference is ecosystem breadth and battery. For iPhone users who primarily use their watch for fitness tracking, sleep monitoring, and notifications, the Series 11 delivers the full Apple Watch health experience at a price that makes the Ultra 2 hard to justify for most.

highlights.title: Garmin Forerunner 965 Sets the Standard for Competitive Runners
highlights.body: The 9.5 health tracking score on the Forerunner 965 reflects Garmin's unmatched running metrics depth: VO2 max estimation calibrated by running efficiency, training load balance across aerobic and anaerobic effort, race predictor accuracy grounded in current fitness data, and HRV status tracking that flags overtraining before performance drops. For competitive runners, these metrics justify the Garmin platform choice on their own.

zh-tw.commentary: 進入四月下旬，Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 繼續並列第一，兩台各有勝場，沒有強行拆開排名的理由。Ultra 2 是 iPhone 使用者要買最頂規智慧手錶的標準答案，titanium 機身加上最亮的 Apple Watch 螢幕、雙頻 GPS 和深度 Apple Health 整合，這個組合在 Apple 生態系內目前沒有對手。Garmin Fenix 8 Solar 靠長效電池和多衛星 GPS 精度站穩共同第一，2026 年的長期測試已經確認太陽能版本在戶外白天使用的狀況下電池續航真的可以跑好幾週，這個能力任何 Apple Watch 都做不到。Apple Watch Series 11 對大多數 iPhone 使用者依然是最理性的選擇，健康追蹤評分 9.5 和 Ultra 2 一樣，但售價差了一大截。Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 守住第三，Galaxy AI 功能讓健康感測的解讀深度提升不少，是 Android 使用者的頂級首選。Garmin Forerunner 965 作為認真跑者的專業工具穩居第六，訓練量分析和比賽配速預測精度都是這個類別的標準。Apple Watch Series 12 秋季發表的傳聞持續，但目前榜單只反映已有產品的實測表現。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 是 iPhone 使用者的最強整體選擇
highlights.body: 各家媒體評測榜單持續把 Ultra 2 列為最佳整體選擇。鈦金屬機身、雙頻 GPS、低電量模式 60 小時續航加上最深度的 Apple Health 整合，這個組合在 Apple 生態系內找不到競爭者。NT$27,900 的售價是真的，Ultra 2 跟第二名之間的差距也是真的。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 Solar 的電池續航是這個類別的基準

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 是大多數 iPhone 使用者最值得買的選擇

en.commentary: The Apple Watch Series 11 and Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 head-to-head comparisons are multiplying, and the picture is clear. highlights.title: Apple Watch S11 has the best health sensors in mainstream smartwatches
highlights.body: Blood pressure monitoring and sleep apnea detection are the two additions that matter most for preventive health tracking. The S11 chip with LTPO3 display enables second-by-second always-on updates without meaningful battery penalty. At #4, it's the right recommendation for iPhone users who don't need extreme battery or sport tracking.

The $50 price increase is a real cost, but the Gemini integration justifies it for Android users who use the assistant heavily.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 at #2 is still the athlete's choice by a wide margin

Multi-band GPS accuracy, solar charging option, and training load tracking depth put it in a different category than lifestyle smartwatches. en.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 share the top position, and that tie reflects a genuine philosophical split in what a top-tier smartwatch is for. The Ultra 2 is the best smartwatch for iPhone users who want the full health monitoring platform — irregular rhythm notifications, crash detection, and the deepest integration with iOS health data. Garmin Fenix 8 is the best smartwatch for athletes and outdoor users who need multi-week battery life and precision GPS without being dependent on a phone ecosystem. The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at #3 is the Android answer that matches Ultra 2 in body composition analysis and adds Google ecosystem depth. 2026 wearable trends continue to emphasize health monitoring density: more sensors, more passive data collection, on-device AI processing. Samsung is reportedly working on non-invasive blood glucose monitoring for the Galaxy Watch 8 — if that ships, it changes the ranking substantially. Apple Watch Series 12 is expected later this year with improved battery and Apple Intelligence integration.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 lead different markets at the same tier
highlights.body: These are not competing for the same buyer. Ultra 2 wins for iPhone ecosystem, health sensor density, and wrist presence. Fenix 8 wins for expedition-level battery life, precision multi-band GPS, and ruggedness. Ranking them together is accurate — recommending one over the other requires knowing the buyer.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 with blood glucose monitoring would be a ranking-changer
highlights.body: Non-invasive continuous glucose monitoring would make the Samsung the most medically significant wearable on the market. Reports suggest Samsung is working toward this for the Watch 8 — if it ships with verified accuracy, the Samsung ranking will move up significantly.

highlights.title: On-device AI is becoming the health sensor multiplier in 2026
highlights.body: Raw sensor data is becoming table stakes. The competitive advantage in 2026 is in the AI layer that interprets passive data — sleep staging, readiness scores, anomaly detection. Apple and Garmin both have a lead here over Samsung and smaller players.

zh-tw.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 並列第一，這個並列反映的是兩種對頂級智慧手錶的真實不同哲學。Ultra 2 是 iPhone 用戶想要完整健康監控平台的最佳選擇，不規則心律通知、碰撞偵測、跟 iOS 健康資料最深度的整合，這條路上它沒有對手。Garmin Fenix 8 是給運動員和戶外活動用戶的最佳選擇，需要多週電池續航和不依賴手機生態系統的精準 GPS 定位。Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 排第三，是 Android 陣營的最佳答案，體脂分析跟 Ultra 2 不相上下，加上 Google 生態系統的深度整合。2026 年的穿戴趨勢繼續朝向健康監控密度加深：更多感測器、更多被動數據採集、裝置端 AI 處理。Samsung 據報在研發 Galaxy Watch 8 的非侵入式血糖監測，如果真的上市，排名會大幅改變。Apple Watch Series 12 今年晚些時候預計推出，帶來更好的電池和 Apple Intelligence 整合。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 在同一層次領導不同市場
highlights.body: 這兩款不是在搶同一個買家。Ultra 2 在 iPhone 生態系統整合、健康感測器密度和腕部存在感上勝出；Fenix 8 在遠征等級的電池續航、精準多頻段 GPS 和耐用性上勝出。把它們並列是準確的，推薦哪一款要先知道買家是誰。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 如果有血糖監測，會是一個改變排名的事件
highlights.body: 非侵入式持續血糖監測會讓 Samsung 成為市面上醫療意義最重大的穿戴裝置，如果 Watch 8 帶著經驗證的準確度上市，Samsung 的排名會大幅上升。

highlights.title: 裝置端 AI 在 2026 年成為健康感測器的乘數
highlights.body: 純粹的感測器數據已經是基本配備，2026 年的競爭優勢在於解讀被動數據的 AI 層面，睡眠分期、準備度評分、異常偵測。Apple 和 Garmin 在這一塊都領先 Samsung 和其他小品牌。

references.title: Apple Watch Series 11 vs. Google Pixel Watch 4
Best Smartwatches for Android and iPhone 2026
Apple Watch 11 vs. Pixel Watch 4: 20,000-step test

en.commentary: Google Pixel Watch 4 enters this ranking for the first time, and its 40-hour battery life on the XL model is the reason. Previous Pixel Watch generations never made the cut because their battery life was too close to the Apple Watch tier they were priced against. The Pixel Watch 4 changes that equation with a Tensor G4 chip, Gemini AI integration, and satellite connectivity — a full specification upgrade that now makes it competitive with Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 for Android users. Apple Watch Series 11 strengthened its health position with Hypertension Notifications, a watchOS 26 feature that analyzes 30 days of heart rate data to flag possible hypertension patterns. This is a clinically relevant signal that goes beyond the wellness category. No other mainstream smartwatch at the Series 11 price point offers this feature. Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 remain tied at the top. That tie is deliberate. Ultra 2 is the health monitoring flagship for iPhone users — irregular rhythm detection, crash detection, and the brightest Apple Watch display in a titanium build. Fenix 8 is the expedition tool — 16-day battery in smartwatch mode, multi-band GPS with sub-meter accuracy, and sapphire glass. These two products are not competing for the same buyer, and ranking them the same reflects reality rather than a forced choice. The 2026 purchase question has shifted from app ecosystem depth to clinical sensor capability. Consumers are now asking whether their watch can detect hypertension, monitor blood oxygen during sleep, or alert them to irregular rhythms. Clinical-grade sensors are the new battleground, and every manufacturer is pushing toward it.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 makes Wear OS competitive on battery life
highlights.body: 40-hour battery on the XL model, Tensor G4 processing, and native Gemini AI integration are three upgrades that close the gap on Apple. Pixel Watch 4 at $349 with these specs is the most compelling Wear OS offer since the category launched. It earns rank 7 because health sensor depth and ecosystem maturity still trail the Samsung and Apple flagships above it.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 Hypertension Notifications advance clinical smartwatch territory
highlights.body: Thirty days of heart rate data analyzed to flag possible hypertension patterns — this is not a step-count feature. Hypertension affects roughly one in three adults globally, and most people do not know they have it until damage has accumulated. A watch that can flag this pattern early carries genuine medical significance. Apple Watch Series 11 is the only mainstream smartwatch offering this at its price point in 2026.

highlights.title: Ultra 2 and Fenix 8 at the top serve genuinely different buyers
highlights.body: Ultra 2 leads with health sensor density, crash detection, and the full watchOS app ecosystem in a titanium form factor. Fenix 8 leads with 16-day expedition battery, precision multi-band GPS, and trail navigation tools. Ranking them equally is accurate because recommending one over the other requires knowing the buyer's ecosystem and use case.

highlights.title: Clinical sensors define the 2026 smartwatch purchase decision above all else
highlights.body: The purchase decision in 2026 is not about notification management or app count. Consumers are comparing hypertension detection, blood oxygen monitoring, sleep staging accuracy, and irregular rhythm notifications. Every top-tier manufacturer is racing to add clinically validated sensors. The brands that succeed at this will own the category for the next three to five years.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天把 Google Pixel Watch 4 正式加進排行，入選的直接原因是 40 小時電池壽命，這是 Wear OS 手錶第一次在這個指標上真的拉開距離。過去幾代 Pixel Watch 的電池表現太接近同價位的 Apple Watch，沒辦法正當化獨立排名的位置。Pixel Watch 4 換上 Tensor G4 晶片、內建 Gemini AI、加入衛星連線，這三個升級合在一起讓它成為 2026 年 Android 生態最完整的智慧手錶選項。Apple Watch Series 11 在健康監測這條線上繼續加深護城河，watchOS 26 推出的高血壓通知功能會分析過去 30 天的心率數據，標記可能的高血壓趨勢。高血壓是全球最常見的慢性病之一，很多人不知道自己有高血壓直到出問題，這個功能的臨床意義是實質的。Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 繼續並列第一，這個並列不是評分失準，是因為這兩款錶本來就在服務完全不同的買家。Ultra 2 是 iPhone 生態的頂規健康監測平台，心律不整偵測、碰撞偵測、最亮 Apple Watch 螢幕，全包在鈦金屬錶殼裡。Fenix 8 是真的在山上用的工具，智慧手錶模式 16 天電池、多頻段 GPS 精準度達到公尺以下。2026 年智慧手錶的購買邏輯已經從「哪個 App 多」轉向「這款錶有沒有臨床級感測器」，消費者現在問的是血壓通知、血氧監測、睡眠分期，而不是步數計算。

highlights.title: Pixel Watch 4 讓 Wear OS 第一次在電池這條線上站穩腳步
highlights.body: 大錶款 40 小時電池、Tensor G4 晶片、原生 Gemini AI，三個升級加在一起讓 Pixel Watch 4 成為 2026 年最值得 Android 用戶認真考慮的智慧手錶。約台幣一萬一的定價在這個規格層級是有競爭力的。排名第七是因為健康感測器深度和生態系成熟度還是比上方的 Samsung 和 Apple 旗艦款差一截。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 的高血壓通知是臨床意義最明確的健康功能
highlights.body: 分析 30 天心率數據來標記高血壓趨勢，這個功能的分量和步數計算完全不在同一個層級。全球大約三分之一的成年人有高血壓，很多人不知道，這類早期警示的實際健康價值是可測量的。Apple Watch Series 11 在這個價位是唯一提供這個功能的主流智慧手錶。

highlights.title: Ultra 2 和 Fenix 8 並列第一，服務的是不同的買家
highlights.body: Ultra 2 是 iPhone 用戶的頂規健康監測旗艦，Fenix 8 是登山馬拉松族群的遠征工具，16 天電池加上次公尺級 GPS 精度，這個定位沒有對手。把它們評分相同，是因為推薦哪一款需要先知道你是誰，而不是哪一款客觀上更好。

highlights.title: 2026 年的購買決策軸是臨床級感測器，不是 App 數量
highlights.body: 消費者現在比較的是血壓通知、血氧監測準確度、睡眠分期品質、心律不整偵測靈敏度，這些功能的差異才是各品牌旗艦款之間真正的競爭軸。各大廠都在往這個方向衝，誰先在這些指標上建立可信的臨床驗證，誰就會主導這個品類未來三到五年的排行。

references.title: Best Smartwatch in 2026 — GoodPickr
Garmin Watch vs Apple Watch: What's Best in 2026?
The 8 Best Smartwatches for Health Tracking (2026) — Tested

en.commentary:
Apple Watch Ultra 2 holds rank 1 in April 2026, and recent comparative testing reinforces the health tracking verdict. With ±1.8 bpm heart rate accuracy, the most robust ECG implementation in consumer wearables, and dual-frequency GPS at ±2.1m precision, the Ultra 2 leads the health sensor performance category. The 36-hour battery with optimized mode delivers a full day-and-a-half of full function without charging compromise.

Garmin Fenix 8 ties at rank 1 with an identical 9.2 score, differentiated by use case rather than quality. The Fenix 8's 48+ hours with GPS active — and up to 30 days in expedition mode — is the decisive specification for endurance athletes and outdoor adventurers. The wrist-based heart rate accuracy rivals the Apple Ultra 2, but the Garmin delivers it for three to thirty times longer between charges.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra holds rank 3 as the best option for the Android ecosystem. Blood pressure monitoring, 9.0 health sensor score, and deep Samsung Health integration make it the most feature-complete Android wearable in this list.

The Apple Watch Ultra 3 has been referenced in recent reviews as the current generation — our list reflects the Ultra 2 as the confirmed released model in the review data.

highlights.title: Apple Ultra 2's ±1.8bpm Heart Rate Accuracy Leads Consumer Health Wearables
highlights.body: Tested at ±1.8 bpm mean absolute error against a chest strap reference, the Ultra 2's optical heart rate sensor is the most accurate on the market. Combined with the most robust ECG implementation and dual-frequency GPS at ±2.1m, it's the most clinically-credible health tracking platform in consumer wearables in 2026.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8's 30-Day Expedition Battery Changes Expedition Planning
highlights.body: GPS active for 48 hours or expedition mode for 30 days — the Fenix 8 enables activity tracking for entire expedition trips that Apple Watch and Samsung require mid-activity charging interruptions to complete. For multi-day hiking, mountaineering, or remote adventure activities, this battery capability is not optional.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra Is the Complete Android Health Wearable
highlights.body: Blood pressure monitoring, sleep tracking, ECG, body composition — the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra covers health monitoring comprehensively within the Android ecosystem. For users who have invested in Samsung Health data history, the ecosystem continuity argument for staying with Galaxy Watch is genuine.

zh-tw.commentary:
Apple Watch Ultra 2 在 2026 年四月繼續是智慧手錶第一名，最近的對比測試強化了健康追蹤的評價。心率精準度 ±1.8 bpm、消費級穿戴設備裡最完整的 ECG 實作、雙頻 GPS 精準度 ±2.1m，Ultra 2 在健康感測器表現上領先。36 小時的最佳化模式電力在不妥協功能的前提下撐超過一天半。

Garmin Fenix 8 以相同的 9.2 分並列第一，差異在使用場景而非品質。Fenix 8 在 GPS 開啟狀態下的 48 小時電力，以及探險模式的最長 30 天，是耐力運動員和戶外探險者的決定性規格。手腕式心率精準度和 Apple Ultra 2 相近，但 Garmin 在兩次充電之間能維持三到三十倍更長的時間。

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 第三名，Android 生態系的最佳選項。血壓監測、9.0 健康感測器分數和深度 Samsung Health 整合讓它成為這份榜單裡功能最完整的 Android 穿戴設備。

近期評測中出現了 Apple Watch Ultra 3 的參考，我們的榜單以評測數據中已確認發布的 Ultra 2 為準。

highlights.title: Apple Ultra 2 的 ±1.8bpm 心率精準度領先消費級健康穿戴
highlights.body: 對比胸帶參考測試得出平均絕對誤差 ±1.8 bpm，Ultra 2 的光學心率感測器是市面上最準確的。加上最完整的 ECG 實作和 ±2.1m 的雙頻 GPS，它是 2026 年消費級穿戴設備裡臨床可信度最高的健康追蹤平台。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 的 30 天探險模式改變了遠征計畫
highlights.body: GPS 開啟 48 小時或探險模式 30 天，Fenix 8 讓整個探險旅程的活動追蹤不需要充電中斷，而 Apple Watch 和 Samsung 在長程活動中都需要補電。多天健行、登山或偏遠地區探險，這個電力能力不是選項，是必需。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 是完整的 Android 健康穿戴
highlights.body: 血壓監測、睡眠追蹤、ECG、身體成分，Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 在 Android 生態系裡全面覆蓋健康監測功能。已經在 Samsung Health 累積了健康數據歷史的用戶，留在 Galaxy Watch 生態的理由是真實存在的。
